title: Huawei S310-24U4X, Gigabit PoE smart switch, 4x SFP+
description: Huawei S310-24U4X is a managed and stackable L3 PoE switch, which is equipped with 24 Gbit Ethernet ports with 802.3af/at/bt support and 4 SFP+ slots b>. It supports L3 routing protocols and offers a wide range of management options, including management with the Huawei eKit App , which enables cloud management. Thanks to the Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) service, the switch offers the option of automatic one-click updates. Maximum PoE budget of up to 2268W requires the installation ofŌĆ” Flexible Ethernet Networking: Support for traditional STP, RSTP, MSTP, and the latest ERPS (millisecond-level protection switching). Smart Link functionality enables uplink backup for higher reliability Diversified Security Mechanisms: Support for MAC address and 802.1X authentication , with dynamic policy assignment. Protection against DoS attacks (SYN flood, Smurf, ICMP flood) and user-targeted attacks. DHCP snooping and strict ARP filtering prevent spoofing Easy Operations and Maintenance: Managed via SNMP, CLI, web, SSH . Supports RMON, port traffic statistics, and network quality analysis. MUX VLAN for efficient network segmentation Intelligent Stacking (iStack): Multiple switches can be logically stacked into one virtual device . Redundancy and link aggregation improve reliability. Scalable network capacity with additional switches PoE Power Supply: Fast PoE ├ó┬Ć┬ō Powers connected devices within seconds. Perpetual PoE ├ó┬Ć┬ō Continuous power supply during switch restart Smart Upgrades: Automated upgrades via Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) . Pre-loading of system software toŌĆ”
